description: The expression of creativity through skilled making; works that embody beauty and meaning. 'Shela' names what humans make that transcends utility—creation for its own sake.
sound_symbolism: The word shapes with beauty. 'She' softly opens with gentle creation, form emerging. 'La' flows with expressive beauty, art speaking.
grammatical_notes: Functions as a noun: 'shela' (art), 'lo shela' (arts, works of art). What expresses 'mioru' (beauty). Created through 'lunai' (vision) and skill.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Art as practice—the making itself as meditation, not only the result.
pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Art as life—beauty integrated into daily existence, not separated into museums.
